title: Making Travel Affordable: Special Rates and More for Military Guests
description: Prices on airfare & gasoline can cause a bit of sticker shock when making travel budgets. IHG®Army Hotels is doing its part to make travel more affordable.
text:
Travel is on the rise now that the world has reopened, but inflation might be making families second guess their plans this year. Prices on airfare and gasoline can cause a bit of sticker shock when making a travel budget, but IHG® Army Hotels is doing its part to make travel more affordable.
Rewarding your service with ours
In honor of their service to our country, we are proud to offer our Retiree rate. Created for military retirees and their spouses, this rate will save up to 20% on stays at any of our on-post locations nationwide. This special discount is also available for military veterans. Enjoy advanced booking, guaranteed reservations, a friendly, knowledgeable staff, and all the convenience, security, and amenities staying at an on-post IHG Army Hotels property has to offer.
Year-Round Savings
We’re proud to offer special rates all year long for members of the military and their families, whether they’re traveling for business or leisure.
All rates for official business are always at least 75% of the government per diem rate
Leisure and Unofficial rates are typically always lower than those offered at off-post hotels
Seasonal Savings
Many families can’t bring their loved ones home for holidays, but they can spend time with them on post. We offer discounts to help make those days extra special.
Many of our IHG Army Hotels locations offer special holiday rates from mid-November through early January. Contact the property you are planning on visiting from our locations page to find out if they are participating.
Basic Allowance for Housing (BAH) Rate
To help alleviate the financial crunch brought on by a shortage of homes and soaring rent, this past year IHG Army Hotels extended the BAH rate at all 40 on-post locations across the country. Since the special BAH rate was announced in July 2021, more than 133,000 rooms have been booked, resulting in savings by military service members of $3.6 million. Amenities provided at our hotels, such as complimentary hot breakfast, free WiFi, cable TV and laundry facilities represent additional savings.
The BAH rate is available upon request, under certain terms and conditions, service members should contact the housing office or hotel front desk for more information.
Other Ways to Save on Travel
Are you often on the go for business trips? Treat yourself to some free reward nights in fabulous destinations with our rewards program. IHG One Rewards allows you to turn your official and business travel into free reward nights when it’s time for some R&R. Here are a few ways you can earn points:
Earn points on all rates at IHG Army Hotels
Earn points on qualifying rates at all IHG Hotels & Resorts worldwide.
Enter for a chance to win extra points through our special promotions like the Veterans Day sweepstakes (coming this fall)
Not a member? It’s free to sign up here.
Traveling in the military is often a necessity, even if inflation might make it feel more like a luxury. Thankfully, travel can still be possible with the right planning and the right booking. Find a rate that works for you and enjoy your stay!
